lines.text: A creature is using me as cover. I am forty centimeters tall. This is the worst stealth plan I have ever seen, and I once watched a senior architect hide a production outage in a footnote.
He went this way. I saw him. Apple thief.
Technically not theft. He ate it on the spot. That reclassifies it as unlicensed consumption. Tax evasion.
The apple is inside him, Dren.
There's no form for that. There's barely a form for the apple.
Nobody in this scene is evil. Everybody in this scene is trapped in a workflow. I have never related to a fantasy world more.
